currentBounties.name: Mage Training Arena Circuit
currentBounties.description: Earn 800 points total across Mage Training Arena rooms (any mix).
currentBounties.help: Bring runes and patience; use room guides for correct patterns.

currentBounties.name: Giant Mole Stakeout
currentBounties.help: Bring a light source and a way to track (or learn the tunnels); stamina helps.

currentBounties.name: Pest Control Tour
currentBounties.help: Focus portals; carry a ranged weapon for spinners.

completedBounties.name: Callisto's Challenge
completedBounties.help: Wildy risk; consider a small team and fast tele options.

completedBounties.name: Blast Furnace Shift
completedBounties.description: Smelt 300 bars at the Blast Furnace (any type).
completedBounties.help: Stamina helps; use ice gloves for some bar types.

completedBounties.name: Pond-to-Plate
completedBounties.description: Catch 80 fish of any type and cook at least 50 of them.
completedBounties.help: Pick a spot near a fire/range to reduce travel.

completedBounties.name: Barbarian Assault Shift
completedBounties.description: Complete 1 full Barbarian Assault run (all waves).
completedBounties.help: Know your role calls; bring a friend group if possible for speed.
